events.title: VIP Demo Experience with Reveleer
events.location: Reveleer Booth 306, Hyatt Regency Chicago, 151 E Wacker Dr, Chicago, IL 60601
events.description:
VIP Demo Experience with Reveleer

In your 20-minute session, we'll show you firsthand how Reveleer connects CDI, risk adjustment, and care gap workflows on a shared clinical data foundation - and what that means for your programs.

Where: Reveleer Booth 306 - ACDIS Annual Conference
Hyatt Regency Chicago
151 E Wacker Dr, Chicago, IL 60601

Exclusive VIP Gift: Participants will enjoy designing a custom trucker hat as part of their demo experience.

*Exclusively for health plans, health system/hospitals, and healthcare physician/clinician professionals only. No vendors.

Questions? Email events@reveleer.com
